calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition Of Tapestry On Central Condominium Association To Stay Deposition Of Jeffrey Hall And To Quash Notice Of Deposition And Subpoena Issued By Plaintiff Tapestry On Central, Llc
Off Calendar Sep-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER TAPESTRY ON CENTRAL CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION's Petition To Stay Deposition Of Jeffrey Hall And To Quash Notice Of Deposition And Subpoena Issued By Plaintiff Tapestry On Central, LLC is Off Calendar. Notice of Withdrawal of Petition To Stay Deposition on file Sep-08-2017. Judge Pro Tem Peter Catalanotti, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302/JPT)
